name: lexicon-verify
description: Verify files use canonical Oracle lexicon terms (no deprecated words)

cli.help:
maw lexicon-verify [path...] [--glossary <path>] [--fix] [--json]
       Scan files for deprecated lexicon terms.
       Default paths: ψ/ .claude/
       --glossary  path to GLOSSARY.md (default: ψ/GLOSSARY.md)
       --fix       append correction entries instead of just reporting
       --json      output as JSON for programmatic use
